# initialsOf

## Summary

Computes avatar initials from a full name: first and last word initials for multi-word names, the first two letters for single-word names, and `·` when the name is empty. Used for guest avatars throughout the planner — seat markers, drag chips, and the guest roster in `components/tsp.gts`, plus the Guest, Host, and Person card views.

## Import

```js
import { initialsOf } from '../utils/index';
```

## Usage

```js
initialsOf(name: string | null | undefined): string

initialsOf('Ada Lovelace'); // 'AL'
```
